scripts.up:all: npm run down && npm run up:build:obs
scripts.restart: npm run down && npm run up
scripts.logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml -f docker-compose.local.dev.yml -f docker-compose.local.observability.yml logs -f
scripts.logs:frontend: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml -f docker-compose.local.dev.yml -f docker-compose.local.observability.yml logs -f frontend
scripts.logs:api: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml -f docker-compose.local.dev.yml -f docker-compose.local.observability.yml logs -f backend-api
scripts.logs:worker: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml -f docker-compose.local.dev.yml -f docker-compose.local.observability.yml logs -f backend-worker
scripts.logs:cleanup: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml -f docker-compose.local.dev.yml -f docker-compose.local.observability.yml logs -f backend-cleanup
scripts.ps: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml -f docker-compose.local.dev.yml -f docker-compose.local.observability.yml ps
